findings.t: Wrong HTTP status on duplicate-email path — 201 instead of 200
findings.r: Change the duplicate_email branch to return HTTP_200_OK. The response body is already identical to the idempotency-replay branch.

findings.t: Race condition: duplicate-email guard and user creation are not in the same atomic block
findings.r: Use filter(...).first() instead of exists()+get(), and catch IntegrityError inside the transaction.atomic block on create_user to handle the concurrent-duplicate case gracefully.

findings.t: Recovery code double-spend: _verify_recovery lacks select_for_update
findings.r: Wrap the recovery lookup in transaction.atomic() and use select_for_update() on the queryset. Alternatively, use RecoveryCode.objects.filter(id=row.id, used_at__isnull=True).update(used_at=now()) and check rowcount == 1 before accepting as consumed.

findings.t: /api/accounts/me/ returns 403 instead of 401 when unauthenticated
findings.r: Ensure SessionAuthentication is in DEFAULT_AUTHENTICATION_CLASSES and is configured to raise AuthenticationFailed (401) for anonymous requests, OR explicitly check request.user.is_authenticated at the top of me_view and return HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED.

findings.t: Plaintext super-admin password committed in .env
findings.r: Rotate SUPERUSER_PASSWORD and SECRET_KEY immediately. Audit git history to confirm no prior commit contains it. Use a secrets manager or environment injection at deploy time.

findings.t: Weak TOTP secret encryption: single SHA-256 of SECRET_KEY used as Fernet key
findings.r: Derive the envelope key using HKDF (or PBKDF2) from a dedicated TWOFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable, separate from SECRET_KEY.

findings.t: Login endpoint has no explicit DRF throttle class — brute-force relies solely on axes
findings.r: Add a dedicated LoginRateThrottle (e.g., 10/5min/IP) via @throttle_classes([LoginRateThrottle]) on login_view.

findings.t: last_active_org_id writable via PATCH /me/ without membership validation — IDOR / cross-org probe
findings.r: Add a custom validate_last_active_org_id validator that confirms the user has an active OrganizationMembership for the supplied UUID.

findings.t: X-Forwarded-For trusted without proxy allowlist — IP spoofing bypasses per-IP rate limits
findings.r: Use axes.helpers.get_client_ip_address or django-ipware's get_client_ip which honours a configurable proxy list.

findings.t: effective_modules resolver: wrong boolean default allows non-authenticated objects to bypass early-return guard
findings.r: Change line 113 to: if user is None or not getattr(user, 'is_authenticated', False): return frozenset()

findings.t: MyEffectiveModulesView returns 200 with module data for orgs the requesting user is not a member of
findings.r: After loading org, add a membership check and raise Http404 if user is not an active member.

findings.t: IDOR — admin can create/read module grants for any platform user not in their org
findings.r: After resolving org and target_user, verify membership exists. Return 404 if absent.

findings.t: effective_modules early-return guard uses wrong default — anonymous/non-User objects bypass frozenset() short-circuit
findings.r: Change default to False: getattr(user, 'is_authenticated', False).

findings.t: _OrgMembershipPermission silently passes through when org context cannot be resolved from URL kwargs
findings.r: Change the None branch to return False and whitelist only the specific views that legitimately lack org context.

findings.t: OrgDetailView PATCH bypasses org.settings module — deny override on that module has no effect
findings.r: Add HasModule('org.settings') to the permission_classes on OrgDetailView.

findings.t: emit_audit idempotency check is a TOCTOU race (check-then-create without select_for_update)
findings.r: Replace filter-then-create with get_or_create(idempotency_key=idempotency_key, defaults={...}) or wrap in try/except IntegrityError.

findings.t: CSRF exemption on two authenticated mutation endpoints
findings.r: Remove @csrf_exempt from both views. Require clients to send the CSRF token in X-CSRFToken header.

findings.t: Unvalidated open redirect on ?next= parameter after sadmin login
findings.r: Validate next_url with url_has_allowed_host_and_scheme before redirecting.

findings.t: Arbitrary ORM filter injection via target_filter in bulk-email service
findings.r: Define an explicit allowlist of permitted filter keys. Reject any key not in the allowlist with a 400 response.

findings.t: LoginPage: resolveDestination creates a stale closure and has a race between store state flip and navigate()
findings.r: Derive the destination before the await, or memoize with useCallback.

findings.t: logout() does not purge TanStack Query cache; stale org/member/permission data from prior session is visible on re-login
findings.r: Call queryClient.clear() inside authStore.logout() and authStore.clear() after clearing user state.

findings.t: Org switch does not invalidate cached org-scoped queries — cross-org data bleed
findings.r: In onPickOrg, call queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['org', current.org_slug] }) before navigating.

findings.t: Login success response: frontend expects user object, backend returns {status:'ok'}
findings.r: Include MeSerializer(user).data in the login response body, or remove user? from LoginResponse and make the me() call the single explicit path.

findings.t: acceptInvitation response lacks org_slug; redirect always navigates to undefined
findings.r: Add org_slug to the accept response on the backend via SerializerMethodField.

findings.t: reason field absent from every PUT save — guaranteed 400 on all real saves
findings.r: Add a mandatory reason textarea (min 20 chars) to the save flow. Update setGrants payload to require reason.

findings.t: bootstrap() only short-circuits 401; DRF returns 403 for unauthenticated — sets error banner on /login
findings.r: Change bootstrap guard to: if (e instanceof ApiError && (e.status === 401 || e.isUnauthenticated))

findings.t: Dialog has no focus trap — Tab escapes the modal
findings.r: Implement a focus trap on open or migrate to @radix-ui/react-dialog.

findings.t: No cross-org endpoint isolation tests for UserGrantsView GET/PUT or MatrixView
findings.r: Add parametrized cross-org isolation tests for grants and matrix endpoints.

findings.t: No cross-org isolation tests exist for any organizations API endpoint
findings.r: Add a dedicated test file test_cross_org_isolation.py covering all org endpoints.

findings.t: bulk_set_grants event_id accepted by serializer but silently dropped — bulk grant mutations are not idempotent
findings.r: Wire event_id through to the service layer or explicitly reject calls explaining it is not yet honored.

findings.t: AdminInvitationSerializer returns role (scalar) and invited_by (UUID) — FE expects roles[] array and invited_by_email
findings.r: Add roles SerializerMethodField returning [obj.role] and invited_by_email SerializerMethodField.

findings.t: UUID-routed members endpoint returns OrganizationMembershipSerializer — incompatible shape with slug route
findings.r: Make OrgMembersListView use the same per-user aggregation and OrgMemberDetailSerializer as OrgMembersBySlugView.

findings.t: _invalidate_all_sessions_for_user runs inside @transaction.atomic — O(n) row iteration inside transaction
findings.r: Move _invalidate_all_sessions_for_user to run via transaction.on_commit.

findings.t: Slug uniqueness race: _pick_unique_slug reads availability without lock
findings.r: Catch IntegrityError from Organization.objects.create() inside the atomic block and retry slug generation.

findings.t: OrgMemberRemoveView.delete lacks transaction.atomic() — audit can fail leaving membership silently deactivated
findings.r: Wrap membership.save() and emit_audit() in with transaction.atomic():.

findings.t: MyEffectiveModulesView org lookup missing soft-delete filter
findings.r: Add deleted_at__isnull=True to the filter.

findings.t: invalidate_cache called inside transaction.atomic() — fires before commit
findings.r: Move all invalidate_cache calls to transaction.on_commit.

findings.t: bulk_set_grants has no select_for_update — concurrent PUT requests can IntegrityError
findings.r: Add .select_for_update() to the filter read inside the loop.

findings.t: _OrgMembershipPermission returns True (pass-through) when org cannot be resolved from URL kwargs
findings.r: Add has_permission_without_org: bool = False class attribute. Default to False (deny when org cannot be resolved).

findings.t: twofa_disable_view and twofa_recovery_regenerate_view missing require_recent_password_reauth
findings.r: Apply @require_recent_password_reauth() to twofa_disable_view and twofa_recovery_regenerate_view.

findings.t: Signup: duplicate-email TOCTOU race between exists() check and create_user() produces unhandled IntegrityError 500
findings.r: Catch IntegrityError around create_user() and map it to the duplicate_email=True return path.

findings.t: Signup response shape mismatch: FE declares { user: User } but BE returns { status: 'pending_verification' }
findings.r: Change auth.ts:55 to api.post<{ status: string }>(...)

findings.t: FE InvitationsListPanel reads .roles[] but backend returns singular .role — role badges never render
findings.r: Add roles SerializerMethodField to AdminInvitationSerializer returning [self.role].

findings.t: OwnershipTransferModal: reason, error, conflictAck state not reset when modal re-opens
findings.r: Add useEffect watching [open] that resets all local state when open becomes true.

findings.t: authStore.logout does not reset the bootstrapped flag
findings.r: Reset bootstrapped: false in both logout and clear actions.

findings.t: InviteAcceptPage does not invalidate org-scoped TanStack queries after membership join
findings.r: After refreshMe(), call queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['org', res.org_slug] }).

findings.t: csrf_exempt on session-authenticated sadmin POST endpoints
findings.r: Remove @csrf_exempt from both views. Update callers to send CSRF token via X-CSRFToken header.

findings.t: Open redirect in sadmin_login via unchecked ?next= parameter
findings.r: Validate next with Django's url_has_allowed_host_and_scheme before use.

findings.t: MeSerializer exposes deleted_at field unnecessarily
findings.r: Remove deleted_at from MeSerializer.fields.

findings.t: verify_email audit emitted inside transaction — emit_audit failure rolls back verification state
findings.r: Move emit_audit to emit_audit_on_commit for the email_verified event.

findings.t: soft_delete does not invalidate active sessions
findings.r: Call a session-invalidation utility from within soft_delete or from the soft-delete view after the model save.

findings.t: _hash_token function duplicated in three files — drift risk for token validation
findings.r: Extract to apps.accounts.services._crypto.hash_token() and import from there everywhere.

findings.t: event_id accepted by BulkGrantsCellsSerializer but silently ignored
findings.r: Either enforce idempotency or remove the event_id field until it is implemented.

findings.t: archive_org() from SUSPENDED state leaves stale suspended_at/suspended_reason data
findings.r: When transitioning from SUSPENDED, clear suspended_at and suspended_reason.

findings.t: OrgDetailView.get() returns a raw Response(status=404) bypassing DRF exception handler
findings.r: Replace with raise Http404('Organization not found.').

findings.t: previous_cursor echoes the incoming cursor instead of computing a real backward cursor
findings.r: Either implement true bidirectional cursors or drop previous_cursor and document the endpoint as unidirectional only.

findings.t: PII redaction for non-Super-admin viewers mentioned in docstring but not implemented
findings.r: In get_actor_email_at_time, check the requesting user's role from serializer context and redact the email for non-super-admin viewers.

findings.t: force_password_reset emits a successful audit row even when the email send fails
findings.r: Track success with a boolean and include it in payload_after, or rename the event to reflect intent-not-delivery.

findings.t: impersonate_stop uses uuid.uuid4() as target_id when no impersonation was active, corrupting the audit trail
findings.r: When target is None, log a warning and skip the audit emission or emit with target_id=None.

findings.t: InviteAcceptPage: className='text-grant' is a non-existent Tailwind class
findings.r: Replace text-grant with text-green-600 or the project's success color token.

findings.t: Unvalidated server-supplied data URI rendered as on TOTP enroll page
findings.r: Before setQrDataUri, validate: const safe = uri?.startsWith('data:image/') ? uri : null; setQrDataUri(safe);

findings.t: setTimeout redirect in PasswordResetCompletePage leaks if component unmounts before timer fires
findings.r: Store timer in useRef and clear it in a useEffect cleanup function.

findings.t: Cross-worker effective_modules cache invalidation is deferred — stale permissions possible with multiple ASGI workers
findings.r: Before enabling more than one ASGI worker: implement Redis pub/sub invalidation in grants.py using transaction.on_commit.

findings.t: REVOKE UPDATE/DELETE on audit_event from app Postgres role not implemented in any deploy script
findings.r: Add a deploy/provision.sql containing REVOKE UPDATE, DELETE ON audit_event FROM <app_role>; and document it in the deploy runbook.

findings.t: InMemoryChannelLayer and LocMemCache configured in base.py (not dev-only), will break Phase 1B live features on production
findings.r: Move InMemoryChannelLayer and LocMemCache to settings/dev.py only. Set Redis backends in base.py.
